requirement_topic.en: SEC Electrical Safety Certification and NCh IEC 62841
requirement_topic.zh: SEC 电气安全认证与 NCh IEC 62841
requirement_topic.zht: SEC 電氣安全認證與 NCh IEC 62841

summary.en: Chile requires SEC (Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles) certification for controlled electrical products before they can be sold or imported. Approval is obtained through a SEC-authorized certification body against the applicable Chilean NCh standards, which adopt IEC text; for hand-held and transportable motor-operated tools the relevant family is the NCh IEC 62841 series. The product receives a SEC certificate and seal. Chilean mains are 220 V, 50 Hz single phase, so the tool and any plug must suit Chilean supply.
summary.zh: 智利要求受控电气产品在销售或进口前取得 SEC（电力与燃料监督局）认证。认证须通过 SEC 授权的认证机构、按适用智利 NCh 标准（采用 IEC 文本）完成；手持式和可移式电动工具对应的标准族为 NCh IEC 62841 系列。产品取得 SEC 证书和认证标志。智利市电为 220 V、50 Hz 单相，工具及插头须适配智利供电。
summary.zht: 智利要求受控電氣產品在銷售或進口前取得 SEC（電力與燃料監督局）認證。認證須通過 SEC 授權的認證機構、按適用智利 NCh 標準（採用 IEC 文本）完成；手持式和可移式電動工具對應的標準族為 NCh IEC 62841 系列。產品取得 SEC 證書和認證標誌。智利市電為 220 V、50 Hz 單相，工具及插頭須適配智利供電。

standards_or_laws: SEC mandatory certification regime for controlled electrical products (Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles)
NCh IEC 62841 series (adopted via INN) for hand-held, transportable, and lawn and garden electric tools
SEC certification issued through a SEC-authorized certification body and laboratory

summary.en: China power-tool safety files commonly reference the GB/T 3883 series (hand-held motor-operated electric tools) and use CCC where the product falls in a CCC-listed category. GB/T 3883 reports do not by themselves grant the SEC certificate or seal and must be re-evaluated against the Chilean NCh IEC 62841 edition by an authorized certifier.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具安全文件通常引用 GB/T 3883 系列（手持式电动工具），并在属于 CCC 目录类别时使用 CCC。GB/T 3883 报告本身不能授予 SEC 证书或标志，须由授权认证机构按智利 NCh IEC 62841 版本重新评估。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具安全文件通常引用 GB/T 3883 系列（手持式電動工具），並在屬於 CCC 目錄類別時使用 CCC。GB/T 3883 報告本身不能授予 SEC 證書或標誌，須由授權認證機構按智利 NCh IEC 62841 版本重新評估。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) where the product is in a CCC-listed category

gap.en: The main gap is treating a GB/T 3883 or CCC file as sufficient for Chile. SEC certification is a separate national approval issued by an authorized certifier against the Chilean NCh IEC 62841 edition, with its own certificate, seal, and importer-side registration. The tool must also suit the Chilean 220 V 50 Hz single-phase plug and supply.
gap.zh: 主要差距是把 GB/T 3883 或 CCC 文件视为足以进入智利。SEC 认证是由授权认证机构按智利 NCh IEC 62841 版本签发的独立国家批准，具有自己的证书、标志和进口方注册。工具还须适配智利 220 V、50 Hz 单相插头和供电。
gap.zht: 主要差距是把 GB/T 3883 或 CCC 文件視為足以進入智利。SEC 認證是由授權認證機構按智利 NCh IEC 62841 版本簽發的獨立國家批准，具有自己的證書、標誌和進口方註冊。工具還須適配智利 220 V、50 Hz 單相插頭和供電。

target.en: Mandatory: SEC certification for controlled electrical products against the applicable NCh IEC standard before sale or import in Chile. The NCh IEC 62841 series is the technical basis the certifier applies.
target.zh: 强制：受控电气产品在智利销售或进口前须按适用 NCh IEC 标准取得 SEC 认证。NCh IEC 62841 系列是认证机构适用的技术基础。
target.zht: 強制：受控電氣產品在智利銷售或進口前須按適用 NCh IEC 標準取得 SEC 認證。NCh IEC 62841 系列是認證機構適用的技術基礎。

cn.en: China domestic baseline commonly uses GB/T 3883 series, with CCC where the product is in a CCC-listed category.
cn.zh: 中国境内基线通常采用 GB/T 3883 系列，属于 CCC 目录类别时使用 CCC。
cn.zht: 中國境內基線通常採用 GB/T 3883 系列，屬於 CCC 目錄類別時使用 CCC。

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Chile-ready as-is if the file only contains GB/T 3883 or CCC evidence. SEC certification through an authorized certifier against the Chilean NCh IEC 62841 edition is required, with a 220 V 50 Hz single-phase supply and plug suited to Chile.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若文件仅包含 GB/T 3883 或 CCC 证据，则现状不能视为智利就绪。须通过授权认证机构、按智利 NCh IEC 62841 版本取得 SEC 认证，并采用适配智利的 220 V 50 Hz 单相供电和插头。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若文件僅包含 GB/T 3883 或 CCC 證據，則現狀不能視為智利就緒。須通過授權認證機構、按智利 NCh IEC 62841 版本取得 SEC 認證，並採用適配智利的 220 V 50 Hz 單相供電和插頭。
